recommendations.title: Notting Hill
recommendations.overview: London bookstore owner William Thacker's quiet life turns upside down when a chance encounter with famous actress Anna Scott sparks an unlikely romance challenged by their vastly different worlds.

recommendations.title: Conversations with Other Women

recommendations.title: Little Girl
recommendations.overview: 7-year-old Sasha has always known that she is a girl. Sasha’s family has recently accepted her gender identity, embracing their daughter for who she truly is while working to confront outdated norms and find affirmation in a small community of rural

recommendations.title: As Needed
recommendations.overview: A 40-year-old world-famous chef with anger management issues is assigned to run a cooking class at a centre for young people with autism.

recommendations.title: Lie with Me
recommendations.overview: An author returns to his hometown of Cognac for the first time in 35 years to help promote a distillery. Once there, he meets his first love’s son, Lucas. Memories come rushing back to him: irrepressible attraction, bodies becoming one in the heat of

recommendations.title: Tell Me Who I Am
recommendations.overview: In this documentary, Alex trusts his twin, Marcus, to tell him about his past after he loses his memory. But Marcus is hiding a dark family secret.

recommendations.title: The Final Girls
recommendations.overview: A young woman grieving the loss of her mother, a famous scream queen from the 1980s, finds herself pulled into the world of her mom's most famous movie. Reunited, the women must fight off the film's maniacal killer.

recommendations.title: Crossroads
recommendations.overview: A wanna-be blues guitar virtuoso seeks a long-lost song by legendary musician, Robert Johnson.

recommendations.title: The First Time
recommendations.overview: A spark of attraction smolders, then ignites, between two teens from different high schools who meet by chance at a party.
